description: Add a new emergency contact to the CAMEO Data Manager database, which currently contains contacts imported from Tier II data (Debra Monaco, Vincent Martinez, and Mike Ward). The new contact details are: First Name: 'Sarah', Last Name: 'Chen', Title: 'Environmental Compliance Officer', Email: 'schen@burlingtonfire.gov', Phone: '802-555-0147' (Work phone), and Contact Type: 'Fac. Emergency Coordinator'.
